Title: Authorizes an overnight residential parking system in the village of Hempstead
Summary: Authorizes the village board of trustees of the village of Hempstead to provide for a residential parking permit system and fix and require the payment of fees applicable to parking within the area in which such parking system is in effect.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to a residential parking system in the village of Hempstead
